name: Loading Dock Golem
description: The golem of the loading dock.
defeatTalk: The Golem's massive frame comes to a halt with a deafening roar.

battle.armor_deflected:
🛡️ [Armor] The heavy plating deflects the attack!
(A powerful 'Explosion' is needed to breach the gaps in the armor...)
core_exposed: 💥 KABOOM! The reinforced chest plating is completely shattered!
🔍 The foggy [Stealth] device stops due to an overload,
✨ revealing the glowing [Mechanical Core] at the boss's center!
